rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Ensure AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Align helper declaration types with expression types for valid comparisons
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Remove range comparisons or 0/1 equality over non-numeric data ports
Use eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value for range comparisons
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid
Use visible identifiers from the current scope
Component type annexes are the normal location for assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
